description_long: This is a small, portable bottle of Germ-X moisturizing original hand sanitizer, featuring a white plastic body with a slightly rounded rectangular shape and a cylindrical screw-on cap. The front label is predominantly blue and white, with the Germ-X logo, product name, and a gold seal indicating it kills 99.99% of germs. The back of the bottle displays a detailed drug facts label in black text on a white background, providing information about ingredients, usage, and warnings. The bottle is semi-opaque, allowing some light to pass through but not fully transparent. The cap is smooth and matches the body in color, designed for easy gripping and removal. The overall design is clean and functional, suitable for carrying in a bag or placing on a desk in urban environments.
description: A compact white plastic Germ-X hand sanitizer bottle with a blue and white label and a screw-on cap.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Germ-X logo, blue and white label, and product details.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, smooth white plastic surface with no visible labels.
description_view_2: Back view featuring the drug facts label in black text on a white background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, plain and unmarked, similar to view 1.
